name: Ping Pong
current_goal: Maintain the single-node intranet speed-test service with browser-scoped Recent Results, fixed homepage Quick 20s and Full 30s modes, proportional startup trimming, Raw CV and Stable CV throughput diagnostics, stability-first completion summaries, required per-test Wired/Wi-Fi labeling, current connection IP visibility, Web Worker execution, HTML/PNG/Markdown IT diagnostic report export, local-throttled maintenance self-tests, a desktop one-screen dashboard, Admin Console controls, local production health, OctoPulse visibility, and repo-visible project documentation.
latest_summary: Implemented automatic Local throttled profile handling for allowed local self-tests. /api/config now advertises a localThrottle profile only for local clients that can run tests; worker runs use one connection, smaller payloads, and 32 Mbps pacing; saved results persist testProfile through validation, SQLite, Recent Results, completion summaries, and IT reports. A short desktop-height overlap that blocked Start was fixed by allowing natural page height below 821px.
next_action: Push the local self-test throttling commit to origin/main when ready. Separately decide whether the pre-existing .gitignore, AGENTS.md, deleted Ping-Pong project docx, untracked HTML specification, and docs/analysis-data-debugging.md changes are intentional.

last_commands: npm test -- test/speed-test-core.test.ts test/api.test.ts test/report-export.test.ts test/speed-test-worker-client.test.ts test/result-summary.test.ts
In-app Browser DOM verification loaded http://127.0.0.1:8200/ and confirmed Local throttled banner with no console errors/warnings; screenshot capture timed out and Start click was not reliable there

Playwright CLI opened http://127.0.0.1:8200/, selected Wi-Fi, ran Quick 20s, observed ~32 Mbps throttled download, reached Test Summary with Local throttled, opened Recent Result detail with Profile Local throttled, and reported zero warning/error console messages
verification.notes: Focused local-throttle tests passed with 5 files and 55 tests. Full typecheck passed, full Vitest passed with 8 files and 82 tests, git diff whitespace check passed, and production build passed. The LaunchAgent-backed service was restarted on .env port 8200; lsof confirmed node listening, health/config/active-tests checks returned successfully, and /api/config showed localThrottle active for localhost with 32 Mbps, 1 connection, 262144-byte download chunks, and 131072-byte upload bodies. In-app Browser confirmed the local throttled banner and clean console but its screenshot capture timed out and Start click was unreliable. Playwright CLI verification completed a localhost Quick 20s Wi-Fi run, observed throttled throughput around 32 Mbps during download, reached Test Summary with Local throttled, saved a Recent Result with Profile Local throttled, and reported zero warning/error console messages. A screenshot was copied to /tmp/ping-pong-qa/local-throttled-result-detail.png and transient .playwright-cli artifacts were removed. Browser verification remains a localhost local self-test, so real intranet performance still needs a separate non-local device run.

attention: Working tree remains dirty beyond the local self-test throttling implementation because of pre-existing .gitignore and AGENTS.md edits, a deleted Ping-Pong project docx, untracked Ping-Pong-Project-Specification.html, and docs/analysis-data-debugging.md.
.ai/status.json will need a post-commit refresh with the resulting commit hash after this implementation is committed.
The branch is ahead of origin/main by 2 commits and has not been pushed.
The running service uses .env PORT=8200, not the README default 8080.
Local throttled runs are maintenance checks only; a non-local intranet device test is still required to evaluate real network performance.

recent_changes.summary: Implemented automatic Local throttled profile handling so allowed localhost maintenance tests use capped traffic and are labeled across UI, storage, and reports.
